hero.title: Car Rental in Moldova
hero.description: The best cars at affordable prices. From economical sedans to premium SUVs.

starting_rate_note.days_16_plus: per day for rentals from 16 days

footer.description: Premium car rental in Moldova. A wide range of vehicles from sedans to SUVs.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.subtitle: Get in touch in any convenient way. We work 24/7.

about_page.title: About Us
about_page.subtitle: AutoTerra — your trusted car rental partner in Chisinau and across Moldova since 2016. We offer free airport delivery and the best rates in the city.
about_page.feature1_text: All cars go through regular maintenance and are fully insured.
about_page.feature2_text: Only modern vehicles from leading global brands.
about_page.feature3_text: Our team is always available and ready to help.
about_page.feature4_text: More than {{count}} cars of different classes in our fleet.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.section1_text: This Privacy Policy defines how AutoTerra processes and protects users' personal data.
privacy_page.section3_text: Collected data is used only for order processing, communication with clients, and service improvement.
privacy_page.section4_text: We use modern security methods and do not transfer personal data to third parties without user consent.
privacy_page.section5_text: The website uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze traffic.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What documents are needed for rental?
faq.a1: Passport and driver's license. Minimum age — 21 years, driving experience — at least 2 years.
faq.q2: Can I rent a car without a deposit?
faq.a2: The deposit depends on the vehicle class. For economy class, the deposit is minimal. Contact us for details.
faq.a3: Yes, we deliver the car to Chișinău airport and anywhere in the city for free.
faq.q4: What are the car rental prices?
faq.a4: Prices start from €25/day for economy class. The longer the rental period, the lower the daily rate. Premium cars from €45/day.
